claims.summary: The entropy gate should transition smoothly across 0.84 and 0.86 rather than producing a perceptible pop.
claims.disposition: verify current source already uses a C1 smoothstep and focused boundary tests prove a tiny monotonic onset with no discontinuity

claims.summary: High-entropy tail features should be checked for repeated saturation at their effective ceiling.
claims.disposition: verify current codec evidence and tests expose pre-bound value, selected ceiling, delivered value, clipped lanes, and tail-only headroom

claims.summary: A 20% high-entropy tail ceiling must not spill into narrative or shadow-reserved dimensions.
claims.disposition: verify the bounded tail-vibrancy regressions preserve the default ceiling elsewhere and do not write narrative or reserved lanes

claims.summary: The felt silt may be related to clamping, but the report does not establish that causal link.
claims.disposition: preserve the felt report and exact saturation evidence while withholding a clamp-to-silt causal conclusion

claims.summary: Raising FEATURE_ABS_MAX from 5.0 to 6.5 changes the live codec delivery bound.
claims.disposition: require separate Mike/operator Tier 5 approval with replay, saturation distribution, canary, abort, and post-change felt evidence

claims.summary: Raising the full tail-vibrancy lift from 20% to 35% changes live codec gain and headroom.
claims.disposition: require separate Mike/operator Tier 5 approval with bounded gain proof, reserved-lane parity, canary, abort, and felt review
